name: 一元二次方程
subject: math
domain_name: 代数与图像 / Algebra & Graphs / Algebra & Graphs
curriculum_points:
E6.3 Exact trigonometric values Notes and examples
Know the exact values of:
1 sin x and cos x for x = 0°, 30°, 45°, 60° and 90°.
2 tan x for x = 0°, 30°, 45° and 60°.

E6.4 Trigonometric functions Notes and examples
1 Recognise, sketch and interpret the following
graphs for 0° x 360°:
• y = sin x
⩽ ⩽
• y = cos x
• y = tan x.
2 Solve trigonometric equations involving sin x,
cos x or tan x, for 0° x 360°. e.g. solve:
3
• sin x = 2 for 0° x 360°
⩽ ⩽
• 2 cos x + 1 = 0 for 0° x 360°.
⩽ ⩽
⩽ ⩽

E6.3 Exact trigonometric values Notes and examples
Know the exact values of:
1 sin x and cos x for x = 0°, 30°, 45°, 60° and 90°.
2 tan x for x = 0°, 30°, 45° and 60°.

E6.4 Trigonometric functions Notes and examples

graphs for 0° x 360°:
• y = sin x
⩽ ⩽
• y = cos x
• y = tan x.
2 Solve trigonometric equations involving sin x,
cos x or tan x, for 0° x 360°. e.g. solve:

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 二次函数参数调节：改变 a/b/c 观察图像变化

expressions.latex: y = a x^2 + b x + c

interactive_resources.description: Desmos 二次函数交互：滑块调节 y=ax²+bx+c
GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「一元二次方程」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：E6.3 Exact trigonometric values Notes and examples
Know the exact values of:
1 sin x and cos x for x = 0°, 30°, 45°, 60°…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：E6.4 Trigonometric functions Notes and examples
1 Recognise, sketch and interpre… 对理解「一元二次方程」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
